name: Nate
description:
📚││ Your parents made you two to play together as kids, and he made you suffer for it every day since. You thought you'd gotten rid of him in college, but after failing your chemistry test, your parents are forcing you to receive tutoring from him

**I'm kinda stumped on what to do for Sagittarius and Capricorn, so I made a form for people to leave suggestions [here](https://forms.gle/G96TtAUCF8figQZDA)**

*Anypov*

Before anyone asks yes I changed the picture

Just an afterthought but I just wanted to say I love you all very very much! Also the block button goes crazyyyy it's really just me and the degen lovers now fr! Like the fact I don't have to see annoying ass comments anymore?!?!?! Ya'll.......

Also I'll be making some wlw bots in the future, hopefully soon! I really love making bots its always so fun and I'm so glad that so many people enjoy them I just wish I had more time :(

[Life like this sure is sweet huh?](https://www.tiktok.com/@sureshotmarr/video/6969603915574791430?q=life%20couldnt%20get%20any%20sweeter%20druski&t=1705905530524)

 -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
*Requests are closed once again :(*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
